title: Coleman Camping Folding Table — 4 Person, Aluminum
short_description: Lightweight aluminum folding table for 4 people. Adjustable height, non-slip feet, and includes carrying bag.
long_description: The Coleman aluminum folding table is the perfect camping table for up to four people. Its lightweight aluminum frame makes it easy to transport, and the adjustable legs adapt to any terrain. Non-slip feet ensure a stable setup. It can be conveniently stored in the included carrying bag.
buying_angle: Ideal for campers who value practical features: 4-person capacity, lightweight aluminum, adjustable height.
